content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift routes users to a custom star widget that pre-filters sentiment, sending only ≥4-star ratings to the App Store write-review link (App/RatingGateView.swift:12-20) instead of using `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`, and description.txt explicitly begs "rate us 5 stars!" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).

Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits gating App Store review prompts by pre-screening user sentiment and prohibits soliciting specific star ratings — both patterns are present here. Replace the custom gate with Apple's native `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview(in:)` (or `.requestReview` environment action) shown unconditionally to all users, not just happy ones, and remove "rate us 5 stars" language from the description to avoid a 5.6.1/5.6.3 rejection.
